name: Peanut Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1-2 tablespoons hot pepper oil (lime juice if desired)
Chopped cilantro and red onion slices for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a blender until smooth.
2. Thin the mixture with hot water to reach a whipping cream consistency before use.
[This is a wonderful recipe I got from the net ages back. If used over noodles, sprinkle toasted sesame seeds, red onions, and cilantro for garnish.]
